description: Style Note Taking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist. Product Details Yellow top that has a boat neck, with a tie up at the neckline, keyhole detail below the neck, three quarter raglan sleeves with elasticated cuffs, lace trim and pin tucks along the middle of the top till the hem, elasticated and smocked at the hem Material and Care100% cotton Machine wash in cold water at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
